mano_cua.result_summary: Tauri 桌面应用，Vite dev server 页面在 Chrome 中显示空白（缺少 Tauri IPC 上下文），无法导航到关于页面进行布局测试
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Both BongoCat tabs at localhost:5173 show blank pages. The app is a Tauri SPA that requires Tauri IPC context to initialize. Without the Tauri runtime, the page cannot render its Vue components. Tried navigating to different paths and checking system tray but could not access the About page layout in the browser.
